channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kim Chiu shares her perspective on giving back for her birthday by offering free gas to motorists
item.description: Kim Chiu recently celebrated her birthday by giving back to the community in a unique way—by offering free gasoline to motorists in her hometown. The actress, who is known for her philanthropic effort...

item.title: Court Hearing for Stepfather of Missing Nova Scotia Children Rescheduled to July
item.description: The assault case against Daniel Martell, the stepfather of two missing children in Nova Scotia, has been postponed to July. Martell is scheduled to appear in provincial court in Pictou, Nova Scotia, o...

item.title: Thrissur Results: LDF Retains Majority Amidst Strong UDF Performance in Kerala
item.description: In the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, Thrissur district emerged as a notable exception to the broader anti-Left wave sweeping across the State. The Left Democratic Front (LDF) managed to secure nine ...

item.title: Gen Z Goliath Bradley Responds to Fan Greeting at Nairobi Pub
item.description: In Nairobi, influencer Bradley, popularly known as Gen Z Goliath, was involved in a tense exchange with a fan at a pub after a simple greeting sparked a confrontation. According to witnesses, the inci...

item.title: US calls for international support to secure shipping through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US military has deployed two guided-missile destroyers to the Gulf, aiming to break an Iranian blockade and ensure safe passage for commercial shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz. Two ...

item.title: IUML's A.K.M. Ashraf Wins Manjeswaram Seat with Significant Margin in 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections
item.description: In the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, A.K.M. Ashraf, representing the Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) and the United Democratic Front (UDF), achieved a decisive victory in the Manjeswaram constitue...

item.title: Kim Kardashian reflects on her Met Gala fashion evolution ahead of 2026 event
item.description: Kim Kardashian has shared a retrospective of her Met Gala appearances, posting a series of throwback images on Instagram ahead of the 2026 event. The reality star and entrepreneur revisited over a dec...

item.title: MKP Reaffirms Commitment to Pro-Black Economic Policies After Meeting with AfriForum
item.description: The meeting between Jacob Zuma, leader of the Umkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP), and Kallie Kriel of AfriForum in Durban last week was focused on mutual issues such as mother tongue education, agricultural...

item.title: Dutch Artist Transforms Plastic Waste into Insect Sculptures to Highlight Environmental Loss
item.description: Dutch artist Henk Loorbach has created a striking art series called Litterbugs that transforms discarded plastic items into lifelike insect sculptures. Using materials collected from beaches such as b...

item.title: Lagos Court Rules Co-Defendant’s Statement Admissible in Emefiele’s Trial
item.description: For the Special Offences Division of Lagos High Court, dem don rule say the extrajudicial statement wey Henry Omoile, co-defendant to former CBN Governor Godwin Emefiele, make fit dey used as evidence...

item.title: Labour confronts voter dissatisfaction in Bradford amid local elections
item.description: Labour, a party historically rooted in Bradford, faces a challenging local election as residents express frustration over city decline and deindustrialisation. Long-term Labour supporters like John Va...

item.title: Mercy Wanjiru's Death Revealed: CCTV Footage Exposes What Happened After Her Party
item.description: The tragic death of Mercy Wanjiru has left many people shocked, especially after CCTV footage revealed chilling details of her final moments. Mercy had attended a party with friends, but she was aband...

item.title: AIADMK's Nallathambi A Wins Gangavalli Assembly Seat by 14,404 Votes
item.description: In the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, AIADMK candidate Nallathambi A emerged victorious in the Gangavalli constituency, a Scheduled Caste reserved seat in Salem district. He secured 73,167 votes,...

item.title: Spring Flooding in Saskatchewan Cuts Off Communities and Washes Out Roads
item.description: Saskatchewan is experiencing significant flooding this spring as melting snow overwhelms roads and threatens homes across the province. In northwest Saskatchewan, communities such as English River Fir...

item.title: Supreme Court temporarily allows broad access to abortion pill mifepristone
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has temporarily reinstated broad access to the abortion pill mifepristone, overturning a recent ruling that threatened to limit one of the primary methods for obtaining abortion...

item.title: Understanding Hantavirus: Causes, Symptoms, and Treatment
item.description: Hantavirus is a group of viruses typically carried by rodents, which can cause severe and sometimes fatal illnesses in humans. Infection usually occurs when rodent droppings, urine, or saliva become a...

item.title: HMS Iron Duke Withdrawn from Service, Reducing Active Royal Navy Frigate Fleet
item.description: The Royal Navy has effectively reduced its active frigate fleet to just five vessels following the withdrawal of HMS Iron Duke. The Type 23 warship has been stripped of its weapons and sensors and has...

item.title: JMFyang Shares Fun and Honest Insights in Lie Detector Game
item.description: In a lively episode of the Lie Detector game, JMFyang candidly shared personal insights that had fans feeling kilig. The game, designed to reveal honest answers, allowed JMFyang to open up about crush...

item.title: Albanese government delays scaling back electric vehicle subsidy for another year
item.description: The Albanese government has announced it will continue offering a tax break for electric vehicle (EV) purchases for another 12 months before gradually scaling back the scheme. The policy, which has ex...

item.title: Vehicle Crashes Into Worshippers During Juma’at Prayer in Yobe, 2 Dead, 32 Injured
item.description: A tragic accident occurred on Friday at the JIBWIS Juma’at Mosque along the Kano–Maiduguri highway in Damagum, Yobe State. A commercial passenger bus lost control and crashed into worshippers who were...
